TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Brandon_Armstrong, title = Brandon_Armstrong, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brandon_Armstrong} }

S.FORM: Brandon Armstrong sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1980, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 6, Brandon Armstrong, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Armstrong htagan beh sa San Francisco,California.raral ga mzyu mari maki Pepperdine hopa pqwasan biru. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Brandon Armstrong sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1980, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 6, Brandon Armstrong, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Armstrong htagan beh sa San Francisco,California.raral ga mzyu mari maki Pepperdine hopa pqwasan biru. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ő≤ran*on arms~…ētroŇč s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ő≤ran*on arms~…ētroŇč, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. qnxan nja arms~…ētroŇč ńßta…£an ő≤eńß s~…ēa s~…ēan *ran ¶~ ®is~…ē ¶~ ®o, ¶~ ®ali*ornia.raral …£a mzju mari maki pepper*ine ńßopa pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
